summary: Iteration 114: Testing checkout flow, TTS config, Pet Soul APIs, Wishlist, and MiraFloatingButton. Backend: 11/11 tests passed. Frontend: MiraFloatingButton visible, but Store Pickup option NOT removed from checkout (bug found).

ui_bugs.issue: Store Pickup option is still present in checkout. The requirement was to remove it, but only Checkout.jsx (old page) was updated with a comment. UnifiedCheckout.jsx (active checkout) still shows Store Pickup option.

verified_features.details: MiraFloatingButton with data-testid='mira-floating-btn' is visible in top-right corner showing 'Ask Meera!' and 'Meera ✨'
GET /api/tts/config returns provider=elevenlabs, configured=false (no API key), features include 'Mira pronounced as Meera'
MembershipOnboarding.jsx has 'Add Another Dog' button at line 798 with data-testid='add-more-dogs-btn' and another at line 1011 with data-testid='add-another-dog-btn'

action_items: CRITICAL: Remove Store Pickup option from UnifiedCheckout.jsx (lines 756-766). The checkout page at /checkout uses UnifiedCheckout component, not Checkout.jsx. The Store Pickup button and related pickup location selection code needs to be removed.
Update UnifiedCheckout.jsx to only show Home Delivery option, similar to how Checkout.jsx was intended to be updated
critical_code_review_comments: UnifiedCheckout.jsx still has Store Pickup option (lines 756-766) - this was supposed to be removed
The comment '/* Store Pickup Section removed - delivery only */' was added to Checkout.jsx but the app uses UnifiedCheckout.jsx for /checkout route
App.js line 262 shows: <Route path='/checkout' element={<UnifiedCheckout />} /> - this is the active checkout component

success_rate.frontend: 80% (MiraFloatingButton works, Add Dog button exists in code, but Store Pickup not removed)

context_for_next_testing_agent: The checkout flow uses UnifiedCheckout.jsx component (not Checkout.jsx). Store Pickup option needs to be removed from UnifiedCheckout.jsx lines 756-766. MiraFloatingButton is working correctly. TTS is configured but needs ELEVENLABS_API_KEY to be functional.

checkout_store_pickup.issue: Store Pickup option still visible in UnifiedCheckout.jsx
checkout_store_pickup.expected: Only Home Delivery option should be shown
checkout_store_pickup.actual: Both Home Delivery and Store Pickup options are shown

add_another_dog.note: Button exists in code, browser testing crashed
